category_sources: Official Preevy documentation describes provisioning, managing, and exposing ephemeral environments for containerized applications in the cloud.
source_facts.description says Preevy quickly deploys preview environments to the cloud.
display_name_sources: Official documentation title and source_facts.homepage use the display name Preevy.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Preevy documentation site with intro, CI integration, CLI reference, runtime, security, and FAQ sections.
repo_sources: Official Preevy GitHub repository links to the full documentation at https://preevy.dev/.
Official Preevy documentation includes an edit link into the Livecycle/Preevy GitHub source.
tags_sources: Official documentation says Preevy provisions preview environments for Docker Compose applications and containerized cloud workloads.
source_facts.description identifies preview environments in the cloud.
